metadata.title: AgenticFlow
metadata.description: An open-source engine for orchestrating complex AI agent swarms and multi-agent workflows.

auth.title: Sign in to AgenticFlow
auth.description: Continue with your Google or GitHub account

hero.title: Orchestrate Intelligent
hero.description: AgenticFlow is the unified orchestration layer for multi-agent systems. Build, deploy, and scale complex AI workflows with a powerful visual-first orchestration engine.

workflow.title: Visually Orchestrate Your Swarm
workflow.description: Design complex agent behaviors using our intuitive node-based interface. Handle branching, loops, and parallel execution with ease.

items.title: Low-Latency Execution
items.description: Sub-second response times for complex agent interactions using our optimized runtime.

items.title: Safety Guardrails
items.description: Built-in logic to handle safety, reliability, and cost-control for production swarms.

items.title: Multi-Agent Memory
items.description: Persistent state management across entire swarms. Agents share context seamlessly.

items.title: Tool Connectors
items.description: Connect to 100+ tools out of the box—from GitHub to Slack and custom APIs.

items.title: Dynamic Scaling
items.description: Automatically spin up agents based on workload. Scale up or down as your swarm needs.

items.title: Advanced Analytics
items.description: Deep observability into your swarm. Monitor tokens, latency, and success rates.

cta.title: Ready to automate
cta.description: AgenticFlow is free and open source. Sign up, connect your OAuth provider, and deploy your first agent swarm in minutes.

footer.tagline: Building the orchestration layer for the next generation of intelligent software.

featuredTrending.title: Most Popular Swarms
featuredTrending.description: Discover what the community is building with multi-agent orchestration.

featuredRecent.title: Recently Added
featuredRecent.description: Stay updated with the latest agent capabilities and plugins.

seoStrategist.name: SEO Content Strategist
seoStrategist.description: Analyzes search trends and generates high-ranking content briefs.

csResponse.name: Automated CS Response
csResponse.description: Routes tickets and suggests resolutions based on past data.

prReview.name: PR Review Assistant
prReview.description: Standardizes pull request reviews for style and common bugs.

travelPlanner.name: Travel Planner Pro
travelPlanner.description: Orchestrates flights, hotels, and itinerary based on preferences.

sqlGenerator.name: SQL Query Generator
sqlGenerator.description: Translates natural language to complex SQL optimized for BigQuery.

emailOutreach.name: Email Outreach Swarm
emailOutreach.description: Sends personalized emails and handles automated follow-ups.

workspaceList.title: My Workspace
workspaceList.description: Build and manage your agents and multi-agent workflows.
workspaceList.emptyDescription: Start your first swarm by selecting a template or building from scratch.

knowledge.title: Knowledge Base
knowledge.description: Manage the documents and data your agents use for retrieval (RAG).

coldStorage.title: Cold Storage
coldStorage.description: Archive large datasets for periodic runs.

accessControl.title: Access Control
accessControl.description: Secure data partitioning at the swarm level.

plugins.title: Plugin Marketplace
plugins.description: Extend your agents with powerful tools and native integrations.

buildOwn.title: Build your own plugin
buildOwn.description: Access our SDK to build custom tools and integrations for your private swarm or the public marketplace.

descriptions.googleSearch: Allow agents to search the web in real-time.
descriptions.githubSync: Read/write access to repositories and issues.
descriptions.slackBot: Deploy agents as interactive Slack apps.
descriptions.stripePayments: Handle transactions and check subscription status.
descriptions.cronScheduler: Schedule agent runs at specific intervals.
descriptions.vercelDeploy: Automate deployments based on agent output.

editor.chatEmpty: Send a message to start simulating your swarm

inspector.title: Node Configuration
inspector.promptPlaceholder: Introduce yourself as the Router Agent...
inspector.promptDefault: You are the Nexus Router. Your job is to analyze user intent and route the request to either the Research Agent or the SQL Analyst based on whether it requires web scraping or database querying.
